_note: Updated by Level Design after each task. Reports to Development. Plain language — no jargon.

priorities.title: Build the world graph validation logic — catch unreachable rooms before export
priorities.note: A room that can't be reached from the start point breaks the game silently. Automated reachability checking must be in place before any world graph is exported to the game runtime.
priorities.proposed_solution: Implement automated world-graph reachability validation on export so unreachable rooms fail before they hit the runtime.

priorities.title: Validate level design gap/platform geometry against the locked movement parameters
priorities.note: Blocked on game systems locking the movement values. Once those are finalized, all room geometry should be reviewed for playability.
priorities.proposed_solution: When movement values freeze, audit room geometry against those parameters for fair gaps, platforms, and gates.

risks_p1.title: No automated world graph reachability check
risks_p1.note: Unreachable rooms or softlocks can be introduced without any validation catching them. This must be fixed before any game build is tested.

actions.name: Room Audit
actions.description: Design quality assessment of a room layout — progression logic, reachability, entity placement validity, metroidvania design compliance.
actions.trigger: Any room layout submitted for review — manual or AI-generated

actions.name: Copilot Prompt Review
actions.description: Validation round-trip test + design quality assessment of sample outputs for a proposed prompt change — pass/flag/reject.
actions.trigger: Before any Copilot prompt architecture change

actions.name: World Graph Audit
actions.description: Reachability analysis, deadlock detection, and progression gate ordering assessment for the current world graph.
actions.trigger: After rooms are connected in the world builder, or before any release

actions.name: Entity Spec Review
actions.description: Schema contract assessment and level design role validation for a proposed new entity type.
actions.trigger: When a new entity type is proposed
